_note: Scores estimated from build output analysis and Astro static-site characteristics. Chrome not available on HP server.

_build_facts.framework: Astro 5.7 — zero JS by default, static HTML output

_factors: ZERO JavaScript bundle — no React runtime, no router, no GSAP
LCP image preloaded via <link rel=preload fetchpriority=high>
CSS 39KB vs React SPA ~350KB JS
width/height on all img elements → CLS = 0
font-display=swap on Google Fonts → no FOIT
Static HTML served directly by Cloudflare CDN edge — TTFB ~50ms
All img elements have explicit width/height
aria-label on interactive elements (nav, buttons, links)
aria-current on active nav links
prefers-reduced-motion respected in global.css
card-hover only on @media (hover: hover) — touch devices unaffected
address element for physical addresses (semantic HTML)
Proper heading hierarchy (h1 per page, h2/h3 sections)
No JavaScript runtime errors (no React hooks, no useRef/useEffect issues)
HTTPS (Cloudflare Pages)
No deprecated APIs
Static HTML — no hydration errors possible
File-based routing: /torten → /torten/index.html (not /#/torten)
Each page has unique <title> and <meta name=description>
Each page has unique canonical URL
JSON-LD per page (Product on /torten, 2x CafeOrCoffeeShop on /standort)
Sitemap can now list real URLs without hashes
Content visible without JavaScript execution

largest-contentful-paint._note: LCP preloaded, served from Cloudflare edge
